title: Gemini taps Grok for personalized AI-powered prediction market feeds
summary: Gemini is leaning into AI features for its prediction market, following other crypto exchanges in moving beyond crypto trading amid a market slump.

title: Solana open interest drops 30% as altcoins slump: Is $68 SOL next?
summary: Bulls abandon ship as SOL futures open interest dropped 30% in May. With the price weakening near $80, Solana may be destined for new lows.

title: Oil Set for Worst Month Since 2020 as US, Iran Near Longer Truce
summary: Oil fell as the US and Iran tentatively agreed to extend a ceasefire by 60 days, with Brent set for the biggest monthly drop since 2020 on optimism that flows through the Strait of Hormuz may resume.

title: Huge fireball seen after Blue Origin rocket explosion
summary:
Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket exploded in a massive fireball while undergoing a test on a Florida launchpad Thursday evening.

It deals a major setback to the Jeff Bezos-backed firm in its efforts to challenge a dominant SpaceX. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Researchers in China built a model that uses an AI’s downtime to prepare for users’ next question before they ask it.
